title: LU1 3TS, Thames Water Utilities Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/TP3505MK/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Thames Water Utilities Limited   Installation name: East Hyde Sludge Treatment Centre   Permit number: EPR/TP3505MK/A001   "
